body.processed:
Join us for our monthly business luncheon featuring keynote speaker Dr. Patricia Hernandez, Chief Economist at First National Bank, presenting the economic outlook for the second half of 2026.

Program

  • 11:30 AM - Networking and registration
  • 12:00 PM - Lunch served
  • 12:30 PM - Keynote presentation
  • 1:15 PM - Q&A and discussion
  • 1:45 PM - Adjourn

Sponsorship opportunities available. Contact events@riversidechamber.org.
body.summary: Join us for our monthly business luncheon featuring keynote speaker Dr. Patricia Hernandez, Chief Economist at First National Bank, presenting the economic outlook for the second half of 2026.Program1

body.processed:
Our signature networking event! Mingle with fellow business owners and professionals in a relaxed, social setting. This month's mixer is hosted by Riverstone Brewing Company, featuring complimentary craft beer tastings and appetizers.

Why Attend

  • Expand your professional network
  • Build referral partnerships
  • Learn about new businesses in the community
  • Enjoy complimentary food and drinks

Bring your business cards and an open mind. Guests of members welcome.

body.processed:
Celebrate the outstanding achievements of Riverside businesses at our annual awards gala. This black-tie event honors innovation, community impact, leadership, and entrepreneurial success.

Award Categories

  • Business of the Year (Large and Small)
  • Entrepreneur of the Year
  • Community Impact Award
  • Innovation Award
  • Emerging Business Award

Nominations are open through August 31. Formal attire requested. Tables of 8 available for corporate sponsors.
body.summary: Celebrate the outstanding achievements of Riverside businesses at our annual awards gala. This black-tie event honors innovation, community impact, leadership, and entrepreneurial success.Award Catego
